description_long: This armchair features a striking shell-like backrest with scalloped edges, upholstered in a rich, deep pink fabric that gives it a luxurious and bold appearance. The seat is round and plush, matching the backrest in color and texture, and appears well-cushioned for comfort. The armrests are integrated into the shell design, curving smoothly from the backrest to the front, creating a seamless and enveloping form. The exterior of the chair is finished with a glossy, hard surface that contrasts with the soft, velvety upholstery on the interior. The chair stands on three slender, angled metal legs, each finished in a different color, adding a modern and playful touch. This unique design makes the armchair a statement piece suitable for stylish urban environments such as boutique hotel lobbies, upscale cafes, or public lounges.
description: A bold, shell-shaped armchair with deep pink upholstery, plush round seat, and three angled metal legs. The glossy exterior and scalloped backrest create a luxurious, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plush, round seat, scalloped shell backrest, and integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlights the glossy, hard shell exterior and angled metal legs.
description_view_2: Back view displays the full scalloped shell design and the three distinct metal legs.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizes the depth of the shell backrest and the curvature of the armrest.
attribute_leg_type: slender, angled metal legs in different finishes
